title: T-006 — sales_orders + sales_order_lines + allergen_overrides + shipping_audit_log schema (11-shipping-b)
prompt:
# T-006 — SO + SO-lines + allergen_overrides + shipping_audit_log schema

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §9.1 (sales_orders, sales_order_lines), §9.2 (allergen_overrides, shipping_audit_log), §6 D-SHP-7 RLS, §6 D-SHP-8 SO status machine, §6 D-SHP-11 Audit Trail (ADR-008), §11 V-SHIP-SO-*
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce 4 SO-domain tables (`sales_orders`, `sales_order_lines`, `allergen_overrides`, `shipping_audit_log`) with `org_id` as canonical scope, RLS via `app.current_org_id()`, status-machine enum, ext_data JSONB (ADR-028 L3), R13 audit cols, and Drizzle ORM schemas.

## Implementation contract
1. Read `packages/db/migrations/` — pick next free 4-digit slot.
2. Migration creates:
   - ENUM `so_status_enum` with values per §6 D-SHP-8: `('draft','confirmed','allocated','partially_picked','picked','partially_packed','packed','manifested','shipped','partially_delivered','delivered','cancelled')`.
   - `sales_orders` (org_id, site_id, order_number text UNIQUE per org with format `SO-YYYY-NNNNN`, customer_id FK customers, customer_po text, shipping_address_id FK customer_addresses, order_date date, promised_ship_date date CHECK >= order_date, required_delivery_date date, status so_status_enum NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft', total_amount_gbp numeric(14,2), allergen_validated boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, confirmed_at timestamptz, confirmed_by uuid, shipped_at timestamptz, ext_data jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb, R13)
   - `sales_order_lines` (org_id, sales_order_id FK ON DELETE CASCADE, line_number int, product_id uuid (FG SSOT consumer — NPD T-001 product table), quantity_ordered numeric(14,3) CHECK > 0, quantity_allocated numeric(14,3) DEFAULT 0, quantity_picked numeric(14,3) DEFAULT 0, quantity_packed numeric(14,3) DEFAULT 0, quantity_shipped numeric(14,3) DEFAULT 0, unit_price_gbp numeric(14,4) CHECK > 0, line_total_gbp numeric(14,4), requested_lot text, notes text, ext_data jsonb, R13; UNIQUE(sales_order_id, line_number))
   - `allergen_overrides` (org_id, sales_order_id FK, customer_id FK, conflicting_allergens jsonb NOT NULL, reason_code text, approver_user_id uuid, approver_pin_hash text — used by @monopilot/e-sign T-124, notes text, overridden_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), audit_hash text NOT NULL) — 21 CFR Part 11 e-sig hook P2.
   - `shipping_audit_log` (org_id, table_name, record_id uuid, old_data jsonb, new_data jsonb, user_id uuid, ip_address inet, action_reason text, changed_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()) — PG triggers emit; 7y retention BRCGS.
3. ENABLE + FORCE RLS on all 4 tables. Policies `<table>_org_context` USING `(org_id = app.current_org_id())` WITH CHECK same — no GUC reads.
4. PG trigger functions `<table>_audit_trigger()` write to `shipping_audit_log` on every INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE of sales_orders + sales_order_lines + allergen_overrides; trigger reads actor `user_id` from `current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)` (different concern from org context; foundation-set).
5. Drizzle schemas in `packages/db/src/schema/shipping/sales-orders.ts`.
6. Register the `audit_events` participant: each of the 4 tables also has a `paired audit_events` row via the foundation R13 pattern (T-040). Coordinate with foundation: this task asserts the trigger calls into both `shipping_audit_log` AND `audit_events`.
7. Cross-module dep: `sales_order_lines.product_id` references NPD `product` table (FG SSOT) — do NOT introduce a parallel `fa_id` or `finished_article_id` column; per Wave0 v4.3 FG SSOT.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/00XX_shipping_sales_orders.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/shipping/sales-orders.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/shipping-sales-orders-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fresh DB, when migration runs, then ENUM so_status_enum exists with all 12 values, and the 4 tables exist with org_id NOT NULL + R13 cols + RLS + FORCE RLS.
2. Given pg_policies is inspected, when listed for the 4 tables, then qual/withcheck reference `app.current_org_id()` and contain no `current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id')` GUC reads.
3. Given INSERT on sales_orders with promised_ship_date < order_date, when constraint runs, then the CHECK fails (V-SHIP-SO-04).
4. Given a sales_orders row is UPDATEd, when the audit trigger fires, then a shipping_audit_log row AND a paired audit_events row are written (both with retention_class=`audit` for shipping_audit_log).
5. Given two orgs each insert a SO with order_number 'SO-2026-00001', when each SELECTs under app.set_org_context, then each sees only its own row (no cross-org leak; UNIQUE per org holds).

## Test strategy
- RED: testcontainers Postgres 16 isolation test asserting AC 1-5; grep-asserts pg_policies text references app.current_org_id() and contains no GUC reads.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test shipping-sales-orders-schema`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not name the business-scope column `tenant_id`.
- Do not read `current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id')` in policies — use `app.current_org_id()`.
- Do not introduce `fa_id` / `finished_article_id` parallel to `product_id` — FG SSOT per Wave0 v4.3.
- Do not omit FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY.
- Do not implement status-machine enforcement here — schema-only; state machine in T-007.
- Do not seed any SO rows.

pipeline_inputs.description: 4 SO-domain tables + status machine ENUM + audit triggers + RLS via app.current_org_id().
pipeline_inputs.details: Pre-impl: git status + read migrations/. Status ENUM matches D-SHP-8 exactly (12 values). product_id references NPD product table (FG SSOT). Triggers write both shipping_audit_log AND audit_events (foundation R13 pairing). No GUC reads in policies — app.current_org_id() only.
out_of_scope: Do not implement state machine transitions here (T-007).
acceptance_criteria: Given a fresh DB, when migration runs, then so_status_enum has 12 values and the 4 tables exist with org_id NOT NULL, FORCE RLS enabled, and correct FK constraints.
Given pg_policies inspected, when listed, then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() and contain no current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') GUC reads.
Given INSERT on sales_orders with promised_ship_date < order_date, when CHECK runs, then it fails (V-SHIP-SO-04 constraint).

Given a sales_orders UPDATE, when audit trigger fires, then shipping_audit_log AND audit_events rows are written (R13 dual-write); AND given two orgs each insert SO 'SO-2026-00001', when each SELECTs under app.set_org_context, then each only sees its own row (RLS isolation).
test_strategy: RED: testcontainers Postgres 16 asserting AC 1-5; grep pg_policies text for app.current_org_id() and absence of GUC reads.
Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test shipping-sales-orders-schema`.
risk_red_lines: Do not name the business-scope column tenant_id.
Do not introduce fa_id parallel to product_id (FG SSOT).
Do not omit FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY.
Do not implement status-machine enforcement here.
